raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Nearly $500,000 in cash and bank accounts was recovered during the investigation of unemployment fraud in California.",
    "California taxpayers have lost nearly $10 billion due to fake unemployment claims related to COVID-19.",
    "The state contractor reported that at least 10% of unemployment claims may have been fraudulent before restrictions were implemented.",
    "A 10% fraud rate could total $9.8 billion in fraudulent unemployment payments made from March through September.",
    "More than 1,000 fraudulent EDD applications are believed to have been filed by Nguyen Social Services, LLC.",
    "The EDD has paid out $113 billion in unemployment benefits over the 10 months of the COVID-19 pandemic.",
    "Fraudulent claims included a 99-year-old woman who had not worked for several decades but falsely claimed to be impacted by COVID-19.",
    "The lack of checks and balances in the EDD system contributed to the fraudulent claims being filed by incarcerated individuals.",
    "Assembly Bill 110 aims to require the EDD to access incarceration records to cross-check benefit applications."
  ]
}
```
